================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW # Giant Outdoor Banner Display with 120" x 42" Banner for Large Scale Outdoor Advertising ## Heavy-Duty Wind-Resistant Display System with Custom Printed Banner PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Material Choice for Outdoor Banner Display Product Configuration with Giant Outdoor Banner Display Hardware Banner Display Quantity Selection Standard Banner Display Size: 120" x 42" PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Giant Outdoor Banner Display for Wind-Resistant Advertising Applications

The Giant Outdoor Banner Display rotates with the wind to prevent blowover, making it the ideal solution for large-scale outdoor advertising campaigns. This telescoping display system securely holds a 42" x 10 foot banner with professional-grade hardware designed for commercial use.

The rings along the shaft and horizontal banner bar keep your banner fully extended at all times, ensuring maximum visibility for your advertising message. Simply fill the base with water or sand for proper ballast, and your display is ready for immediate outdoor installation.

Price includes Giant Outdoor Banner Display Hardware and a 120" x 42" Full-Color Printed Banner on durable 13 oz vinyl material suitable for extended outdoor exposure.

Perfect for:

  • Large-scale outdoor advertising campaigns
  • Commercial property promotions
  • Event and trade show outdoor displays
  • Construction site advertising
  • Real estate development marketing
PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Display Material for Outdoor Advertising Applications

13 Oz Vinyl Banner Material: Our premium 13 oz vinyl is the professional-grade material specifically chosen for banner display applications. This heavy-duty material provides excellent durability and print quality for outdoor advertising installations.

Double Sided Vinyl Option: Available for maximum visibility from multiple viewing angles, perfect for high-traffic outdoor advertising locations.

Material Performance Specifications

Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some size fluctuation may occur due to heat application during printing, finishing, and outdoor climate exposure. Our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (example: a 5' banner could have a 2.5" variance). For precision-critical applications, please discuss your specific requirements with our Customer Service team.

Request a sample packet of banner display materials to evaluate quality and durability for your specific outdoor advertising needs.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Display Finishing Options for Professional Installation

Your Giant Outdoor Banner Display includes professional finishing designed specifically for the display hardware system. The banner features reinforced edges and grommets positioned to work seamlessly with the display's ring and bar mounting system.

Standard Banner Display Finishing

  • Reinforced hemmed edges for durability
  • Professionally placed grommets for secure hardware attachment
  • Weather-resistant hem tape application
  • Quality control inspection for proper hardware compatibility

Hardware Compatibility

All banner finishing is optimized for the Giant Outdoor Banner Display hardware system, ensuring proper fit and professional appearance during outdoor installation.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Display Production Times & Turnaround Options

We provide flexible production scheduling to meet your outdoor advertising campaign deadlines. Choose from multiple turnaround options ranging from express 2-day service to cost-effective 5-day production.

Available Production Schedules

2 Business Days Express

Ideal when you need your banner display quickly for urgent advertising campaigns.

  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Emergency same-day service available in select cases
  • Production time includes banner printing and hardware preparation

3 Business Days Standard

Our most popular turnaround option - free express service for most custom banner display orders.

5 Business Days Saver

Cost-effective option for planned advertising campaigns with flexible timelines.

Important: Turnaround begins when file upload is complete. If artwork requires prepress review or proof approval, production starts from approval confirmation.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Display Payment Options & Order Processing

All Giant Outdoor Banner Display orders require payment prior to production to ensure immediate processing of your outdoor advertising project.

Accepted Payment Methods

  • Credit Cards: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover
  • Business Checks: Must be received and cleared before production begins

Order Processing

Your credit card will not be charged until you have reviewed and approved your banner display order details. This ensures accuracy before production begins.

For check payment processing information and business account setup, review our check order guidelines.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Display Shipping & Delivery Information

Giant Outdoor Banner Display orders ship via UPS Ground unless otherwise specified. Due to the size and weight of the display hardware, special shipping considerations apply.

Shipping Process

  • You receive tracking information once your banner display ships
  • Shipping costs determined by weight, size, and destination
  • Additional charges apply to large format display orders
  • Hardware and banner may ship separately for optimal packaging

Available Shipping Methods

  • Economy Shipping: 5–10 Business Days
  • Standard Shipping: 3–5 Business Days
  • Three Day Service: 3 Business Days
  • Two Day Service: 2 Business Days
  • Overnight Express: 1 Business Day

Delivery & Damage Policy

After shipment, all shipping company terms apply for delays or lost packages. Damaged banner displays must be returned for replacement processing. Lost packages are replaced after shipping company confirms loss (typically 7–10 business days).

International Shipping: Customers must provide shipping labels and customs documentation. We accept international labels from USPS and UPS only.

Questions about banner display shipping? Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 before ordering.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Outdoor Applications for Giant Banner Display Systems

The Giant Outdoor Banner Display is engineered for professional outdoor advertising applications where wind resistance and visibility are critical for campaign success.

Commercial Advertising Applications

  • Retail Promotions: Grand openings, sales events, and seasonal campaigns
  • Real Estate Marketing: New development promotion and property advertising
  • Construction Sites: Project advertising and contractor promotion
  • Event Promotion: Outdoor festivals, fairs, and community events
  • Business Locations: Storefront advertising and directional signage

Installation Environments

  • Shopping center parking lots and retail locations
  • Construction sites and development properties
  • Event venues and festival grounds
  • Commercial property frontage
  • Trade show outdoor areas

Wind-Resistant Design Benefits

The rotating mechanism prevents wind damage and ensures your advertising message remains visible even in challenging weather conditions. The ballast base system provides stability while allowing natural wind movement.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Display Artwork Requirements & File Specifications

Professional artwork preparation ensures optimal print quality for your Giant Outdoor Banner Display advertising campaign.

Recommended File Formats

  • Vector Files: .eps files with fonts converted to outlines (preferred for best quality)
  • High Resolution: .pdf or .jpg files at 300 DPI minimum
  • Large Format Files: .tiff files for complex designs

Artwork Guidelines for Banner Displays

  • Design for 120" x 42" finished size
  • Include 1" bleed area around entire design
  • Keep critical text and logos 2" from edges
  • Use high-contrast colors for maximum outdoor visibility
  • Consider viewing distance when sizing text and graphics

Professional Design Support

Our graphic design team can help optimize your artwork for large format banner display printing. If you're unsure about file quality or technical specifications, our designers will ensure your artwork meets production standards.

Proof Options Available

  • Order Proofs: Review design, pricing, and order details before production
  • Color Match Proofs: Critical color matching for brand-sensitive projects

Unsure about your artwork files? Our professional graphic designers are ready to help optimize your banner display design for maximum impact.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Your Giant Outdoor Banner Display Today

Ready to create maximum impact for your outdoor advertising campaign? The Giant Outdoor Banner Display provides the professional visibility and wind-resistant performance your business needs.

Each complete system includes:

  • Professional-grade telescoping display hardware
  • Custom printed 120" x 42" banner on durable 13 oz vinyl
  • All mounting rings and hardware for immediate installation
  • Fillable base for secure outdoor positioning

Professional Installation Support

Our customer service team can provide installation guidance and answer technical questions about your banner display setup. Contact us at (320) 391-5300 for expert assistance.

Custom Design Services Available

Need professional design help? Our graphic designers specialize in large format advertising and can create impactful designs optimized for outdoor visibility and brand recognition.

Questions about your banner display project? Call (320) 391-5300 and speak with our banner display specialists.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Giant Outdoor Banner Display FAQ

How does the wind-resistant design work?

The display rotates freely with wind direction, preventing the banner from catching wind and potentially tipping over. This rotating mechanism ensures your advertising remains visible while protecting the hardware from wind damage.

What type of base ballast is recommended?

The base can be filled with water or sand for stability. Water is easier to transport and fill, while sand provides additional weight for high-wind areas. The base holds sufficient ballast for most outdoor advertising applications.

Can the display hold two banners simultaneously?

Yes, the Giant Outdoor Banner Display hardware is designed to accommodate one or two banners, providing flexibility for double-sided advertising or seasonal message changes.

What is the maximum wind speed rating?

While the rotating design helps prevent wind damage, we recommend securing or removing the display during severe weather conditions with sustained winds above 35 mph for optimal safety and banner preservation.

How long does the banner material last outdoors?

Our 13 oz vinyl material is designed for extended outdoor use, typically maintaining excellent appearance for 2-3 years under normal weather conditions. UV-resistant inks help prevent fading during outdoor exposure.

Is assembly required for the display hardware?

The Giant Outdoor Banner Display requires basic assembly. All necessary hardware and instructions are included. Most customers can complete setup in 15-20 minutes.

Can I order replacement banners for existing hardware?

Yes, replacement banners are available for existing Giant Outdoor Banner Display hardware. Simply specify that you need a replacement banner when ordering.

What file format works best for large banner artwork?

Vector .eps files with outlined fonts provide the best quality for large format printing. High-resolution .pdf files (300 DPI minimum) also work well for photographic designs.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
